description.ko: 식물학과 기술의 정교한 융합을 보여주며, 미세 회로와 데이터가 풍부한 토양이 디지털 생명을 지탱하는 꽃들의 개화를 표현합니다.
description.en: An intricate fusion of botany and technology, where flowers bloom with micro-circuits and data-rich soil supports digital life.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Fiber-Optic Grove.' A futuristic botanical scene featuring a cluster of translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink flowers with petals intricately etched with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry. Glowing #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins pulse within the stems, which are rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil. Shimmering digital pollen particles float in the air like suspended pixels. Macro photography focus on the intersection of biological petal textures and metallic hardware integration. Unreal Engine 5 style, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution, showcasing the eternal spring of a digital garden.
